title: [FIRRTL][LowerDomains] Add support for DomainCreateOp
body:
Add support for lowering DomainCreateOp in the LowerDomains pass.  Domain
create operations are lowered to object instantiations where all input
fields are connected to unknown values. This differs from anonymous
domains which are lowered to a single unknown value.

This is a temporary solution while full domain support is brought online.
Currently domains do not support assignments to their fields after
creation.  Once this support is added, I will loop back and update the
LowerDomains pass to lower to these property assignments as opposed to
unknown values.  There is a TODO in the pass expressing this intent.

AI-assisted-by: Augment (Claude Sonnet 4.5)
